description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust Docker image. Define the default stages and add a build job that runs `uname -a`, `rustc --version && cargo --version`, and `cargo build --release`, then publishes the compiled binary at `target/release/hitman` as an artifact. Add a test:cargo job that enables caching of all untracked files, runs `rustc --version && cargo --version` followed by `cargo test --jobs 1 --release`, and runs in the test stage. No services, variables, or conditional rules are required.
